div.div:
Policy · GET /v0.1/servers
INBOUND
• cors origin:* · GET, OPTIONS · headers: Authorization, Content-Type
• cache-lookup (TTL 60–300 s)
• authentication-managed-identity
resource = https://azure-apicenter.net
• set-backend-service → API Center data plane
• rewrite-uri /workspaces/default/...
• set-header Authorization: Bearer @(token)
OUTBOUND
• set-body → MCP v0.1 projection { servers[] }
• cache-store duration = 120 s
Retired vs POC: ARM call (control plane)
